Y el esp\u00edritu de Yav\u00e9 permaneci\u00f3 sobre David desde aquel d\u00eda.Luego se march\u00f3 Samuel y volvi\u00f3 a Ram\u00e1.", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 445, 1440, 625], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 629, 1440, 860], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 16 - Ver.: 19", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 629, 1440, 737], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "En vista de esto Sa\u00fal envi\u00f3 mensajeros a Jes\u00e9 con esta orden: \u00abM\u00e1ndame a tu hijo David, el que est\u00e1 con el reba\u00f1o.\u00bb", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 737, 1440, 860], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 864, 1440, 1038], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 16 - Ver.: 21", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 864, 1440, 972], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Lleg\u00f3 David donde Sa\u00fal y se qued\u00f3 a su servicio.", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 972, 1440, 1038], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 1042, 1440, 1330], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 16 - Ver.: 22", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1042, 1440, 1150], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Este le tom\u00f3 mucho cari\u00f1o y lo hizo su escudero. Con esto, Sa\u00fal mand\u00f3 decir a Jes\u00e9: \u00abTe ruego que tu hijo David se quede a mi servicio, porque me cae bien.\u00bb", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1150, 1440, 1330], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 1334, 1440, 1622], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 16 - Ver.: 23", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1334, 1440, 1442], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Cuando el esp\u00edritu de Dios atormentaba a Sa\u00fal, David tocaba la c\u00edtara y Sa\u00fal encontraba calma y bienestar, y el esp\u00edritu malo se apartaba de \u00e9l.", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1442, 1440, 1622], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 1626, 1440, 1857], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 17 - Ver.: 3", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1626, 1440, 1734], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Los filisteos ocupaban un lado de la monta\u00f1a y los israelitas el lado opuesto, quedando el valle de por medio.David y Goliat", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1734, 1440, 1857], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 1861, 1440, 2092], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 17 - Ver.: 12", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1861, 1440, 1969], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "David era hijo de un efrateo de Bel\u00e9n de Jud\u00e1, llamado Jes\u00e9, que ten\u00eda ocho hijos.", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1969, 1440, 2092], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 2096, 1440, 2327], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel - Cap.: 17 - Ver.: 14", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvBibleChVer", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 2096, 1440, 2204], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "David era el menor de todos; los tres mayores hab\u00edan seguido a Sa\u00fal", "resource-id": "com.biblia.latina:id/tvTextFound", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 2204, 1440, 2327], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.LinearLayout", "bounds": [0, 2331, 1440, 2392], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "1 Samuel -
